name: Mexican Praline Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Place rack in center of oven.
3. In a mixer, cream together the sugar and butter until smooth.
4. Mix in the egg yolk, cinnamon, and salt.
5. Add the flour and mix well.
6. Add chopped pecans and mix until just blended.
7. Take 2 tablespoons of dough and roll into a ball.
8. Place the balls on an ungreased baking sheet, about 2 inches apart.
9. Bake for about 22 minutes, or until edges begin to turn brown.
10. Remove from oven and cool completely on a wire rack.
11. To serve, sprinkle tops with confectioner's sugar (pressed through a fine sieve).
12. Makes 3 1/2 dozen cookies.
Note: To toast pecans, preheat oven to 350°F. Spread pecans in a single layer on a baking sheet and bake until color deepens and they smell fragrant, about 7 to 10 minutes. Watch carefully so they do not burn.
